summary: ESS Mobile App Redesign - Code Review & Backend API Testing Complete. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). This is a React Native Expo mobile app that cannot be tested via browser automation - requires APK/IPA build for actual mobile testing. Code review completed with minor observations.

frontend_issues.notes: React Native mobile app - UI cannot be tested via browser automation. Requires building APK/IPA and testing on physical device or emulator.

critical_code_review_comments: POSITIVE: Dark theme implementation is consistent across all screens (#0B1120 background, #3B82F6 primary)
POSITIVE: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
POSITIVE: Proper use of SafeAreaInsets for iOS/Android screen handling
POSITIVE: React Query used correctly for data fetching with proper cache invalidation
POSITIVE: Proper error handling with user-friendly Alert messages
POSITIVE: Token refresh interceptor implemented correctly in api.ts
MINOR: SettingsScreen.tsx line 177 shows copyright 2024 - should be updated to 2026
MINOR: NotificationContext.tsx has unused 'handleNotificationTap' function that only logs data
OBSERVATION: App uses production API at crmdev.wisedrive.com - ensure this is intentional for testing

success_rate.frontend: N/A - React Native mobile app cannot be tested via browser automation

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native Expo mobile app located at /app/ess-mobile-app. It connects to production ESS API at https://crmdev.wisedrive.com/api. All backend APIs are working correctly. To test the mobile UI, you need to: 1) Build the app using 'expo build' or EAS Build, 2) Install on physical device or emulator, 3) Test manually or use Detox/Appium for automated mobile testing. The web preview at wisedrive-ess.preview.emergentagent.com shows the main CRM web app, NOT the mobile app.

backend_apis.auth_login: PASS - Both CEO and HR users can login
backend_apis.health_check: PASS - ESS API health check passing

code_review.data_testid_attributes: VERIFIED - All interactive elements have testID
code_review.safe_area_handling: VERIFIED - useSafeAreaInsets used in all screens
code_review.error_handling: VERIFIED - Proper error handling with Alerts
code_review.navigation: VERIFIED - Bottom tabs and stack navigation configured correctly
code_review.api_integration: VERIFIED - Axios with interceptors for auth token refresh

screens_reviewed: LoginScreen.tsx - Dark theme login with gradient background
HomeScreen.tsx - Dashboard with stats bento grid
LeaveScreen.tsx - Leave balance cards and history
LeaveDetailScreen.tsx - Leave request details with cancel option
PayslipsScreen.tsx - Payslips list with year filter
NotificationsScreen.tsx - Notifications with mark all read

mocked_apis.FCM_push_notifications: MOCKED - No actual push sent without Firebase credentials

testing_limitations: React Native Expo mobile app cannot be tested via Playwright browser automation. The app requires building (APK for Android, IPA for iOS) and testing on actual mobile devices or emulators. Consider using Detox or Appium for automated mobile UI testing.
